description: IP resolution fix spanning auth API route, utility lib, and test file - test imports production API types
rationale: app/api/auth/forgot-password/route.ts = auth domain (path contains api/auth). app/api/ip/route.ts = api domain (path contains api/). packages/lib/getIP.ts = unknown (utility). packages/lib/getIP.test.ts = test (excluded). Path classification: auth + api = 2 domains = WARNING. The test file imports NextApiRequest (api-domain type) and vitest (test framework) - conflicting domain imports. Semantic analyzer should suppress hints for the test file. Without conflict detection, the test's NextApiRequest import could reinforce 'api' incorrectly or add noise.
notes: Tests importing production framework types (NextApiRequest) is a common pattern that creates import conflicts. The semantic analyzer should detect test framework + production type imports as conflicting and yield no hint, letting path-based test exclusion handle it.
